currentMonth.label: March 2026
currentMonth.summary: Comprehensive technical SEO overhaul and on-page optimization across key pages. Successfully resolved critical technical issues including meta descriptions, broken JavaScript, and 404 errors while establishing strong keyword foundation.
currentMonth.strategy: Focus on technical SEO foundations and on-page optimization to support 20% traffic increase goal from 51k to 61k sessions by August 2025

tasks.task: SEO Technical Fixes - Meta Descriptions, JavaScript, 404 Errors
tasks.subtasks: Fixed 34 missing meta descriptions, resolved 36 pages with broken JavaScript, corrected 14 404 errors
Identified high-impact keywords with search volume and intent analysis
Optimized meta titles/descriptions, H1/H2 structures, internal linking, image optimization, URL structures, breadcrumbs, schema markup

tasks.task: On-Page SEO Optimization - Post a Job Page
tasks.subtasks: Complete on-page optimization including meta elements, heading structures, internal linking, and schema implementation
Full on-page SEO treatment with optimized meta data, content structure, and technical elements
Established Google Analytics and Search Console baseline metrics and conversion tracking
